Package com.irurueta.units

Class Distance

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.Measurement<DistanceUnit>
      • com.irurueta.units.Distance
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    public class Distance
extends Measurement<DistanceUnit>
    Contains a distance value and unit.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void add​(double value, DistanceUnit unit)
      Adds provided distance value and unit and updates current distance instance.

      Adds two distance values and units and returns the result.
      void add​(Distance distance)
      Adds provided distance and updates current distance.
      void add​(Distance d, Distance result)
      Adds provided distance and stores the result into provided distance.
      static void add​(Distance arg1, Distance arg2, Distance result)
      Adds two distances and stores the result into provided instance.
      void add​(java.lang.Number value, DistanceUnit unit)
      Adds provided distance value and unit and updates current distance instance.
      static java.lang.Number add​(java.lang.Number value1, DistanceUnit unit1, java.lang.Number value2, DistanceUnit unit2, DistanceUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two distance values and units and returns the result.
      Distance addAndReturnNew​(double value, DistanceUnit unit, DistanceUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided distance value and unit and returns a new distance instance using provided unit.
      static Distance addAndReturnNew​(Distance arg1, Distance arg2, DistanceUnit unit)
      Adds two distances.
      Distance addAndReturnNew​(Distance d, DistanceUnit unit)
      Adds provided distance to current instance and returns a new distance.
      Distance addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, DistanceUnit unit, DistanceUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided distance value and unit and returns a new distance instance using provided unit.

      Determines if two distances are equal up to a certain tolerance.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Distance

        public Distance​(java.lang.Number value,
                DistanceUnit unit)
        Constructor with value and unit.
        Parameters:
        value - distance value.
        unit - unit of distance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either value or unit is null.

      • Distance

        Distance()
        Constructor.

    • Method Detail

      • equals

        public boolean equals​(Measurement<DistanceUnit> other,
                      double tolerance)
        Determines if two distances are equal up to a certain tolerance. If needed, this method attempts unit conversion to compare both objects.
        Overrides:
        equals in class Measurement<DistanceUnit>
        Parameters:
        other - another distance to compare.
        tolerance - amount of tolerance to determine whether two distance instances are equal or not.
        Returns:
        true if provided distance is assumed to be equal to this instance, false otherwise.

      • add

        public static double add​(double value1,
                         DistanceUnit unit1,
                         double value2,
                         DistanceUnit unit2,
                         DistanceUnit resultUnit)
        Adds two distance values and units and returns the result.
        Parameters:
        value1 - 1st argument value.
        unit1 - 1st argument unit.
        value2 - 2nd argument value.
        unit2 - 2nd argument unit.
        resultUnit - unit of result to be returned.
        Returns:
        result of addition.

      • add

                                   DistanceUnit unit1,
                                   java.lang.Number value2,
                                   DistanceUnit unit2,

        Adds two distance values and units and returns the result.

        unit1 - 1st argument unit.
        value2 - 2nd argument value.
        unit2 - 2nd argument unit.
        resultUnit - unit of result to be returned.

        result of addition.

      • add

        public static void add​(Distance arg1,
                       Distance arg2,
                       Distance result)
        Adds two distances and stores the result into provided instance.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - 1st argument.
        arg2 - 2nd argument.
        result - instance where result will be stored.

        public static Distance addAndReturnNew​(Distance arg1,
                                       Distance arg2,
                                       DistanceUnit unit)
        Adds two distances.
        Parameters:
        arg1 - 1st argument.
        arg2 - 2nd argument.
        unit - unit of returned distance.
        Returns:
        a new instance containing result.

      • addAndReturnNew

        public Distance addAndReturnNew​(double value,
                                DistanceUnit unit,
                                DistanceUnit resultUnit)
        Adds provided distance value and unit and returns a new distance instance using provided unit.
        Parameters:
        value - value to be added.
        unit - unit of value to be added.
        resultUnit - unit of returned distance.
        Returns:
        a new distance containing result.

        Returns:
